name: Lode-Star Mining Inc.
summary: Lode-Star Mining Inc. acquires and explores for mineral properties. It holds interests in the Goldfield Bonanza project, which comprises 31 patented mineral claims covering an area of 460 acres located in the district of Goldfield in the state of Nevada. The company is based in Reno, Nevada. Lode-Star Mining Inc. is a subsidiary of Lode Star Gold Inc.
